message.modSyncGuardLoaded: Sync Guard active. Mass inventory moves are rate-limited to reduce desync risk.
message.modSyncGuardTooManyItems: Sync Guard: move at most {0} items at once to avoid desync.
message.modSyncGuardRateLimited: Sync Guard: wait before moving more items.
message.modSyncGuardOrderRateLimited: Sync Guard: wait before sorting containers again.
message.modSyncGuardStats: Sync Guard stats — moves: {0}, bulk: {1}, throttled: {2}, order updates: {3}, disconnects: {4}
message.modSyncGuardHelp: Sync Guard: /syncguard stats | throttle on|off | maxitems N | cooldown N | bulkcooldown N | verbose on|off
message.modSyncGuardUnknownOption: Sync Guard: unknown option. Use /syncguard help.
